ops.text: Build wave landed (7 lanes, ~1.7M tokens): 1a done — spawnllm resolve_model passthrough (85 tests green, real fable smoke; modelUsage=claude-fable-5 verified) + E44 relabel harness (smoke 20 rows: $0.251/row, 11.4s, category kappa judge-vs-fable 0.736, binary agreement 0.90). 1b done — cc_steer/labeling/ package, 13 tests; golden labels.json round-trips through judged.load_golden; human-gold-v1 manifest idiom. 1c done — exact cross-split disjointness (SplitLeakError, watcher-enforced), opt-in semantic near-dup, mine_deep mechanical driver, paired-probs both-arms persistence + measured rho wired into retrain_watcher, plan_rebuild_frame with provenance precedence human>fable>medium-guidance, projected-MDE calculator (335/293 projects 0.0185); full suite+ruff+ty green; instrument.py rho divide-by-zero guard. 1d check-back — outcomes.py resolver + wsr.py (bit-exact vs confseq.predmix, coverage sim, hand-pinned constant); gate_passed=0 ROOT CAUSE: promoted threshold 0.9985 > max live score 0.9827 (distribution shift, not code bug); live data: 309 scored, user steered near 236, gate fired 0; delivered-path verified functional (integration test added). E37 done — MoE harness, 1-step Tinker fit $0.0003, catalog OK; sweep widened to ranks 16/32/64 cap $85 and LAUNCHED. E40 done (report died on schema only) — export.py .cc-pushback fix doubled trajectory corpus 127→254 sessions/917 steers; frame materialized; imminence position prior AUC 0.6072 @ k=3 (beats E31 0.5443 same-turn); tabular/activity arms lose to prior → FT rung must target prose. E41 sanity FAILED (loss 6.141, 0.039 it/s under contention) — diagnosis lane dispatched. E44 relabel LAUNCHED --cap 1450 rows (~$364; frozen-frame+golden first; full-corpus decision after gap read; --cap is ROWS not USD). Fixed 1a↔1b disagreements.jsonl contract mismatch (agreement.py now emits row_id/context/category/labels superset; verified through labeling reader, 19 rows). Review workflow (3 finders + 2-vote refuters, opus) running over both dirty trees. Daemon plist pins cc-steer==0.17.0 from PyPI — deliver flip rides a release, verify --gate-threshold exists in pinned version before flipping.
